title: Belaco Electric Heater Oil Filled Radiator 11 Fins Portable Electric Heater, Room Heater with Adjustable thermostat, 3 Heat settings, 2500W Energy saving Heater for Home (Black)
features: Energy Efficient Heaters Heating Control: Three power levels (1000W, 1500W, and 2500W) electric heater allow you to manage energy use effectively while enjoying fast and consistent heat. Perfect electric heaters for home or Oil filled radiator for multiple Rooms

Safe Family Heater: The plug in heater has built-in safety cut-off and tip-over protection make this oil radiator heater ideal for Bedroom, Office, or Home use, an electric radiator that protects children and pets from accidents.

Peaceful Oil Heater radiators: Designed for minimal sound, this convector Heater is perfect for Bedroom and Office environments, allowing peaceful sleep while combining comfort and quiet operation in your Home.
Portable and Practical: Lightweight design with integrated handle allows you to move. This Portable heaters for home, perfect for Home, Office, or Bedroom Heater.
Cost-Effective Heating: This Room Heater uses low energy efficiently, helping reduce running costs while keeping Home, Office, or Bedroom spaces warm and cosy.
11 Fins Construction: Built with high-quality materials and 11 powerful fins for long-lasting performance. Ideal as an Small Heater for everyday use in the Home or Office.
Safe Heat Control: Overheat protection prevents accidental damage and ensures safe, energy-efficient heating for Bedrooms, Offices, and Living Rooms indoor heater.
